title: Summarize
body: Summarize the following in clear, concise bullet points. Capture the key ideas and any important numbers or names, and skip filler.

title: Fix grammar
body: Fix the grammar, spelling, and punctuation of the following text. Keep the original meaning and tone. Output only the corrected text.

title: Make concise
body: Rewrite the following to be shorter and more direct. Remove repetition and filler. Keep all essential meaning.

title: Rewrite tone
body: Rewrite the following in a warm, professional tone suitable for a colleague. Keep it concise.

title: Translate
body: Translate the following text. Reply with only the translation. If the source language is unclear, detect it automatically.

title: Write email
body: Write a short, professional email for the following request. Include a clear subject line and a polite sign-off.

title: Explain code
body:
Explain what the following code does, step by step, in plain language. Mention any notable design choices or trade-offs.

```

title: Review code
body:
Review the following code. Point out bugs, edge cases, and readability issues, and suggest concrete improvements with short examples.

```

title: Explain like I'm 5
body: Explain the following as if to a curious five-year-old. Use a simple analogy and avoid jargon.

title: Key points
body: List the key points of the following as a short numbered list. One idea per line, plain language.

title: Quiz me
body: Create 5 short quiz questions (with answers at the end) to help me learn the following topic. Mix multiple-choice and short-answer.

title: Brainstorm
body: Brainstorm 10 distinct ideas for the following. Be specific and creative. Number each idea.

title: Pros & cons
body: List the pros and cons of the following as two short columns. Be balanced and concrete.

title: Extract action items
body: Extract the action items from the following as a checklist. Start each with a verb. Skip anything that is not actionable.
